title: Physics-guided neural simulation

abstract_content.main_process: Simulation fields and boundary conditions are encoded by a neural operator, constrained by physics residuals, and decoded into force-aware predictions for downstream engineering decision support.
abstract_content.method_or_model: physics-guided neural operator with residual closure
abstract_content.mechanism: data representation and physical residual jointly regulate prediction consistency
abstract_content.key_result: validated prediction and metric tags are shown as editable placeholders only
abstract_content.application: fast simulation surrogate and decision support

composition.frame_hierarchy: small data frame -> large model frame -> small prediction/decision frame

key_message: Physics-guided neural operators convert simulation fields into traceable prediction, validation, and engineering decision summaries.
